hero.question: Will the Fed decrease interest rates by 25 bps after the April 2026 meeting?
hero.prob_take: The -3.0 point drop signals traders are pricing in a hotter economy and Fed staying higher for longer, betting the April 2026 meeting is too far out for rate cuts to materialize. At 5.5%, the market is overweighting the base case of sticky inflation, but even one adverse inflation print could swing this 10+ points as traders recalibrate.

daily_take.headline: Fed Rate Cut Bet Collapsing. Market Pricing Zero Chance of April Pivot.
daily_take.deck: April 2026 rate cut odds crashed 3 points to 5.5% on $1.6M volume, signaling traders are now convinced the Fed stays hawkish deep into year two. The market is probably right. Inflation stickiness and Fed guidance suggest rate cuts remain a 2H26 story at earliest. Skip this one unless you're contrarian betting on a recession shock.
